topic: Importing Existing Student, Dues, Transport, and Hostel Data
summary: Discusses the process and requirements for importing existing student data, including historical dues, transport details, and hostel information into the new ERP system.
steps: Share existing student data, including admission number, university roll number, and any unique identifiers.
Provide data for old student dues.
Share concession data for old students that should carry forward.
Provide transport data, including bus number, pick-up points, routes, student division per bus, and fees divisions. A sample Excel format will be shared.
Provide hostel data, including hostel name, room details, bed details, and fees divisions. A sample Excel format will be shared.
business_rules: Student registration numbers (admission number, university roll number) should be unique.
Old student concessions, if applicable, will be carried forward.
important_notes: The ERP team will provide sample Excel formats for data import.
Accurate and complete data is crucial for smooth migration and operation.
Importing student data and dues is urgent for immediate fee collection.
The new admission series will start from a specified date (e.g., 26th).
questions: What data is required to import existing students into the ERP?
How do we import historical student dues?
Can existing student concessions be carried forward during data import?
What information is needed for importing transport and hostel data?
Will sample Excel formats be provided for data import?
